scripts.lint: pnpm --filter @ai-voice/web run lint && pnpm --filter @ai-voice/api run lint
scripts.format: pnpm --filter @ai-voice/web run format && pnpm --filter @ai-voice/api run format
scripts.format:check: pnpm --filter @ai-voice/web run format:check && pnpm --filter @ai-voice/api run format:check
scripts.typecheck: pnpm --filter @ai-voice/web run typecheck && pnpm --filter @ai-voice/shared run typecheck
scripts.validate: pnpm lint && pnpm typecheck && pnpm format:check
